item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Education B.Sc. in Economics University of Bonn - 2012—2015 Thesis: Identification Strategies for Software Patents Linking patents to industries is crucial to determine the flow of knowledge, to analyse where patents are used and why. But patents are not easy to classify in topics which researcher are interested in like related to software or certain types of drugs. The patent classification system is structured by function and sorts a water dispenser, pistol, and a manure spreader in the same group.

item.title: Projects
item.description: The Malleability of Locus of Control This research project investigates whether Locus of Control, a psychological measure for a person's belief of having control over the outcomes in their own lives, is malleable. We use the GSOEP (German Socio-Economic Panel) from 2005-2015 and estimate in a difference-and-difference design the changes in Locus of Control due to potentially exogenous and negative events like death of a close relative. The reasoning is that sudden, negative events raise the salience of lack of power which might push the individual towards a more external Locus of Control.
